name: Annapolis MD, USA

rent.notes: Waterfront premium near downtown; inland Parole / Riva / Edgewater cheaper. Still below Fairfax by ~15%.

groceries.notes: Wegmans, Giant, Whole Foods. Mid-Atlantic pricing, slightly below Fairfax.

utilities.notes: BGE (electric + gas) + Annapolis Water / Anne Arundel County water + trash.

healthcare.notes: Medicare + Medigap baseline. Luminis Health Anne Arundel Medical Center; Johns Hopkins / Univ of MD specialists within 30 min.

healthcarePreMedicare.notes: ACA silver benchmark for 2-adult household both age ~60, before subsidies. County-level estimate (Anne Arundel County, MD). MD Health Connection: CareFirst, Kaiser, UnitedHealthcare. Estimated ±15% vs healthcare.gov quote — verify for a specific ZIP before relying on the number.

insurance.notes: Slightly higher than inland VA due to coastal flood risk.

transportation.notes: Car-dependent. Route 50 to DC (~35 mi), Bay Bridge eastbound tolls. No Metro; commuter bus to DC/Baltimore.

entertainment.notes: Comcast 1Gig, streaming, dining out. Historic downtown with waterfront restaurants (premium) and inland casual options.

miscellaneous.notes: Bay Bridge E-ZPass tolls, marina fees if boating, HOA fees in some neighborhoods.

medicalOOP.notes: Same retiree profile as Fairfax base. Specialists at Johns Hopkins / Univ of MD within 30 min.

taxes.notes: Income tax computed from MD + Anne Arundel County brackets; stored value 0 by convention.

petDaycare.notes: Doggy daycare 2 days/week. Similar to Fairfax-area pricing.

stateIncomeTax.exemptions: MD pension exclusion up to ~$39K for retirees 65+; SS fully exempt. Rates above are combined state + Anne Arundel County piggyback (2.81%).

propertyTax.notes: Renters: no direct property tax. Maryland has no vehicle personal property tax — significant savings vs VA.

taxes.notes: MD is a moderately tax-friendly retirement state: SS exempt, pension exclusion, no vehicle property tax. Combined state+county rate higher than VA for upper-middle incomes.

healthcare.notes: Luminis Health Anne Arundel Medical Center, access to Johns Hopkins (Baltimore, ~30 mi) and Univ of MD Medical Center. Excellent coastal healthcare.

acaMarketplace.notes: MD Health Connection: CareFirst, Kaiser, UnitedHealthcare.
acaMarketplace.disclaimer: Estimated ±15% vs healthcare.gov quote — verify for a specific ZIP before relying on the number.

lifestyle.notes: Historic waterfront, Chesapeake Bay sailing, US Naval Academy, Quiet Waters Park. Strong arts and culinary scene.

pros: SS and partial pension tax-exempt in MD
Waterfront lifestyle and Chesapeake Bay access
Access to Johns Hopkins / Univ of MD specialists
cons: Higher combined state+county income tax than VA
Bay Bridge tolls + summer traffic on Route 50
Coastal flood insurance premium in low-lying areas
No Metro; longer commute to DC than Fairfax
